info.title: Kyoto API
info.description: Kyoto API — 160+ Free REST API Endpoints. AI, Anime, News, Internet, Games, Info, Maker, Stalker, Tools, Media. Zero auth, zero self-host, Vercel-optimized.

tags.name: AI
tags.description: AI text, image generation, translation, TTS, code, sentiment, grammar, poetry, story, quiz, recipe — powered by Pollinations.ai, Google Translate, LanguageTool, PoetryDB.

tags.name: Anime
tags.description: Anime/manga search, info, random, waifu, characters, top, seasonal, schedule, genres, episodes, quotes, reviews, studios — powered by Jikan API v4, Waifu.pics, Waifu.im, AnimeChan.

tags.name: News
tags.description: HackerNews, Dev.to, GitHub Trending, BBC, Reuters, Guardian, CNN, Sports, Science, Tech, Crypto, Detik, Kompas, Tempo, ProductHunt, Gaming, Anime News — via RSS & APIs.

tags.name: Internet
tags.description: Meta extractor, HTTP headers, robots.txt, sitemap, URL unshorten, email check, redirect chain, SSL info, DNS lookup, WHOIS, ping — all no-auth.

tags.name: Games
tags.description: Free games, Pokédex, Pokémon list, chess puzzle, Minecraft skin, Valorant agents, BrawlStars, Steam search, trivia — FreeToGame, PokéAPI, Lichess, Mojang, Valorant API.

tags.name: Info
tags.description: Wikipedia, dictionary, GitHub, NPM, country, holiday, exchange, time, color, UUID, crypto, movie, lyrics, universities, IP geo, quote, fact, joke, trivia, advice.

tags.name: Maker
tags.description: AI canvas, meme, QR code, avatar, placeholder, password, color palette, gradient, namecard, thumbnail, banner, lorem ipsum, slug, markdown, badge, OG image — Pollinations.ai, DiceBear, Shields.io.

tags.name: Stalker
tags.description: IP lookup, DNS, WHOIS, GitHub activity, website status, NPM stats, PyPI, Crates.io, domain check — ip-api.com, RDAP, Google DNS.

tags.name: Tools
tags.description: QR code, shortlink, weather, calculator, base64, hash, password, barcode, screenshot, meta, zodiac, NGL, unit converter, lorem — various free APIs.

tags.name: Media
tags.description: Wallpaper, art, profile pic, banner, thumbnail, YouTube info, Unsplash, Picsum, GIF search, TikTok, Instagram, Twitch, Spotify, image transform — Pollinations.ai, Tenor, wsrv.nl.
